title: Cloud Sea
description: Welcome to the Cloud Sea | Explore floating islands in a modpack for Fabric 1.20.1
body:
![A picture of the Cloud Sea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f5c3a57cf1fe1199cf3acf30dd88b66c03c2b1.jpeg)
# Welcome to the Cloud Sea, a sea of floating islands
Come explore with gliders, grappling hooks, and airships.
And expand your base with the Create mod.
![Exploring with Airships](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f555ee4d71ea6407ccbfa463da450de7a67f0ee.jpeg)
## There are 2 versions of this mod. The Standard version and the Lite version
- The Standard version has lots of visual and audio enhancement mods and might need a more powerful PC to run.
- The Lite version is just the barebones modpack with no bells and whistles.

In order to get the right generation, when creating a world change the generation type to OG Stratospherical 

### This modpack also has access to the Cloud Sea server.
I would love feedback and for people to come check it out.
